creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: culot
Date: Mon Aug 26 08:29:38 2013
New Revision: 325375
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/325375

Log:
  - Update to 1.1.1 [1]
  - Add LICENSE (Artistic 1 & GPL 1)
  - Pet portlint(1) by using space instead of tab in Makefile's header
  
  Changes:	http://search.cpan.org/dist/Sys-Virt/Changes
  PR:		ports/181434 [1]
  Submitted by:	Frank Wall <fw@moov.de> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile
  head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo

Modified: head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile	Mon Aug 26 06:48:36 2013	(r325374)
+++ head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/Makefile	Mon Aug 26 08:29:38 2013	(r325375)
@@ -1,9 +1,8 @@
-# Created by:	Frank Wall <fw@moov.de>
+# Created by: Frank Wall <fw@moov.de>
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	Sys-Virt
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.3
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.1.1
 CATEGORIES=	devel perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
@@ -11,6 +10,9 @@ PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
 MAINTAINER=	fw@moov.de
 COMMENT=	Perl bindings for libvirt
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 BUILD_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-XPath>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-XPath
 LIB_DEPENDS=	virt.1001:${PORTSDIR}/devel/libvirt
 RUN_DEPENDS=	p5-XML-XPath>=0:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/p5-XML-XPath

Modified: head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo	Mon Aug 26 06:48:36 2013	(r325374)
+++ head/devel/p5-Sys-Virt/distinfo	Mon Aug 26 08:29:38 2013	(r325375)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (Sys-Virt-1.0.3.tar.gz) = 0ad25b7556275410ff3e4f4019c5a2041fffbe998dd53911db7b8dee0c894acb
-SIZE (Sys-Virt-1.0.3.tar.gz) = 92652
+SHA256 (Sys-Virt-1.1.1.tar.gz) = 161f93cf18219dcbb137d4736c4485b32640813fc495d5be557f58bbf44e6f48
+SIZE (Sys-Virt-1.1.1.tar.gz) = 94938
